steps.t: Javish has asked you to initiate negotiations between a renegade Corsair group which poses a threat to the status quo in Mâr Naphra. The meeting locat…
Adranax planned to betray Javish all along. Javish should know that you had no choice but to defend yourself. Javish can be found in Mâr Naphra.
The Corsairs at Khataj Mârsa have been punished. You should report to Javish your success. Javish can be found in Mâr Naphra.
